name: Kaeng Ped Cai
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Shrimp paste or anchovy paste
1 Red bell pepper, seeded and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bone the chicken breasts, remove skin (reserve for stock or another future use), and cut breasts into strips 1/4 inch wide and 2 inches long.
2. In a large wok or skillet, heat oil until it is almost smoking. Add chiles, garlic, paprika, lemon rind, shrimp paste, caraway, ground coriander, and sugar, and stir rapidly for 1 minute.
3. Add chicken breasts and stir-fry until evenly coated with seasonings and hot throughout (about 2 minutes).
4. Pour in coconut milk and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in green onions, fresh coriander, and bell pepper. Season to taste with salt.
6. Remove from heat and serve immediately with steamed rice. Serves 6.
